prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **Koenigsegg 5.0L V8 (internal code: KDD-50A) twin-turbo** with billet aluminum pistons (Mahle Motorsport 9.5:1 compression) and titanium connecting rods (Pankl Racing Systems) for 1,500+ HP on E85 fuel, paired with a **Weissach-developed dry-sump lubrication system** and **Honeywell Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbos** (custom 106mm compressor wheels, 88mm turbine wheels) with ceramic-coated turbine housings for reduced thermal soak.

Installation of a **Koenigsegg-developed 9-speed multi-clutch transaxle (Light Speed Transmission - LST)** with carbon-fiber clutch plates (Sachs Performance) and a **Pankl Racing helical-cut gearset** (optimized for 1,200 Nm torque capacity), mated to a **Quaife ATB differential** with 45% lockup under load for aggressive launch control.

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **Koenigsegg-specific flex-fuel mapping** (E85/100LL aviation fuel blend), **Bosch Motorsport 8-hole direct injectors (2,200cc/min flow rate)**, and **NGK R8993-10 laser-iridium spark plugs** (0.4mm gap) for optimized combustion at 2.2 bar boost. Includes **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors** and **Kistler 4005B cylinder pressure sensors** for real-time knock detection and adaptive ignition timing.
estetica: Full **Koenigsegg Aircore carbon-fiber bodywork** with **diamond-weave Trevita finish** (exclusive silver-white carbon fiber with micro-diamond infusion), including **Vortex Generators** on the rear fenders and a **custom 3D-printed titanium front splitter** (designed via CFD for 30% more downforce at 250 km/h).

**Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** with **Koenigsegg-specific valving** (24-click rebound, 22-click compression) and **Eibach ERS springs** (1,200 lb/in front, 1,500 lb/in rear), paired with **Brembo GT-R monobloc calipers** (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) and **PFC carbon-ceramic rotors (410mm front, 390mm rear)** with **AP Racing brake pads (DS-3000 compound)** for 1.2G deceleration.

**Rocket Bunny x Koenigsegg collaboration widebody kit** (Trevita-exclusive) with **carbon-fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 50mm wider rear)**, **custom LED taillights (Osram Ostar Projection modules)**, and **Forge Motorsport carbon-fiber side skirts** with integrated **Aeromotions active rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span)** for adjustable downforce (up to 800 kg at 300 km/h).
